result.preview:
"DuckDB query execution error (BinderException): Binder Error: Cannot compare values of type VARCHAR and type DATE - an explicit cast is required

LINE 7: WHERE c."CompanySignedDate" >= DATE '2022-06-25' AND c."CompanySignedDate" <= DATE ...
                                    ^"

args.query:
SELECT o."OwnerId" AS AgentId, SUM(oli."Quantity" * qli."UnitPrice") AS SalesAmount
FROM "Opportunity" o
JOIN "Contract" c ON replace(o."ContractID__c", '#', '') = replace(c."Id", '#', '')
JOIN "OpportunityLineItem" oli ON replace(oli."OpportunityId", '#', '') = replace(o."Id", '#', '')
JOIN "Quote" q ON replace(q."OpportunityId", '#', '') = replace(o."Id", '#', '')
JOIN "QuoteLineItem" qli ON replace(qli."QuoteId", '#', '') = replace(q."Id", '#', '')
WHERE c."CompanySignedDate" >= DATE '2022-06-25' AND c."CompanySignedDate" <= DATE '2022-11-25'
GROUP BY o."OwnerId"
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT o."OwnerId" AS AgentId, SUM(oli."Quantity" * qli."UnitPrice") AS SalesAmount
FROM "Opportunity" o
JOIN "Contract" c ON replace(o."ContractID__c", '#', '') = replace(c."Id", '#', '')
JOIN "OpportunityLineItem" oli ON replace(oli."OpportunityId", '#', '') = replace(o."Id", '#', '')
JOIN "Quote" q ON replace(q."OpportunityId", '#', '') = replace(o."Id", '#', '')
JOIN "QuoteLineItem" qli ON replace(qli."QuoteId", '#', '') = replace(q."Id", '#', '')
WHERE c."CompanySignedDate" >= DATE '2022-06-25' AND c."CompanySignedDate" <= DATE '2022-11-25'
GROUP BY o."OwnerId"
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT o."OwnerId" AS AgentId, SUM(oli."Quantity" * qli."UnitPrice") AS SalesAmount
FROM "Opportunity" o
JOIN "Contract" c ON replace(o."ContractID__c", '#', '') = replace(c."Id", '#', '')
JOIN "OpportunityLineItem" oli ON replace(oli."OpportunityId", '#', '') = replace(o."Id", '#', '')
JOIN "Quote" q ON replace(q."OpportunityId", '#', '') = replace(o."Id", '#', '')
JOIN "QuoteLineItem" qli ON replace(qli."QuoteId", '#', '') = replace(q."Id", '#', '')
WHERE CAST(c."CompanySignedDate" AS DATE) >= DATE '2022-06-25'
  AND CAST(c."CompanySignedDate" AS DATE) <= DATE '2022-11-25'
GROUP BY o."OwnerId"
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT o."OwnerId" AS AgentId,
       SUM(CAST(oli."Quantity" AS DOUBLE) * CAST(qli."UnitPrice" AS DOUBLE)) AS SalesAmount
FROM "Opportunity" o
JOIN "Contract" c ON replace(o."ContractID__c", '#', '') = replace(c."Id", '#', '')
JOIN "OpportunityLineItem" oli ON replace(oli."OpportunityId", '#', '') = replace(o."Id", '#', '')
JOIN "Quote" q ON replace(q."OpportunityId", '#', '') = replace(o."Id", '#', '')
JOIN "QuoteLineItem" qli ON replace(qli."QuoteId", '#', '') = replace(q."Id", '#', '')
WHERE CAST(c."CompanySignedDate" AS DATE) >= DATE '2022-06-25'
  AND CAST(c."CompanySignedDate" AS DATE) <= DATE '2022-11-25'
GROUP BY o."OwnerId"
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
LIMIT 1;
